title: Lucide Releases Version 1.0, Removing Brand Icons and Cutting Bundle Size for Millions of Projects
summary: Lucide has released version 1.0 of its open-source icon toolkit, marking its first stable major release. The update features over 1,600 icons and removes trademarked brand icons due to legal and design concerns. Significant performance improvements have also been made, reducing package size and adding context providers for various frameworks. Users upgrading should be aware of breaking changes. By Daniel Curtis
